author: ezyang
text: torch/nn/quantized/modules/conv.py should not depend on Numpy

author: ezyang
text: We support building PyTorch without Numpy, and none of our core library code should use Numpy. It doesn't even seem to be imported for a good reason, just to run `np.floor`...

author: vishwakftw
text: It seems like we could use floor division for the function that uses np.floor...
